summary: The diff implements most requirements well. Backend CRUD operations are present but lack delete/update methods (only add and getAll). The frontend covers all four sections with correct theming and image references. The generated image files themselves are not present in the diff (omitted due to limits), but the code references them correctly. Overall implementation is strong with minor gaps in CRUD completeness.

missing_requirements.requirement: CRUD operations are available for each data type (students, notices, exams)
missing_requirements.reason: The backend only implements 'add' (create) and 'getAll' (read) operations. There are no update or delete functions for students, notices, or exams in backend/main.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated (actual image files must exist at that path)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff notes one added file was omitted due to limits, and no image files (navodaya-hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png, navodaya-emblem.dim_128x128.png) appear as added files. The code references them at /assets/generated/ but their actual presence cannot be confirmed from the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Mobile hamburger navigation menu with responsive open/close toggle
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a mobile hamburger menu. The Header component implements a mobile menu with Menu/X icons and mobileOpen state that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Expandable 'Read more / Show less' functionality on notice cards
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks for notices displayed in chronological order. The expandable content feature was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Search/filter functionality on the Students page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request asks for a student profile listing with basic details but does not specify a search or filter feature.

hallucinated_features.description: Upcoming/completed status badges on exam entries
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request asks for a timetable view but does not specify status badge differentiation between upcoming and completed exams.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution link in the footer with UTM tracking parameters
hallucinated_features.reason: This was not requested in the build request and is unrelated to the school portal functionality.
